name: mindstudio-http-request-block
description: Configure and use the MindStudio HTTP Request block to send data to external APIs, webhooks, and web services. Use this skill whenever a user mentions HTTP requests, webhooks, calling an API, connecting to Make, Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable, Finnhub, or any external service from MindStudio, wants to fetch or POST data mid-workflow, or asks how to send workflow output somewhere. Always use this skill — do not attempt to configure an HTTP Request block from memory.
author: Sol

scenarios.label: Fetch Data
scenarios.description: Retrieve data from a third-party API without modifying any resources

scenarios.label: Send Data
scenarios.description: Submit JSON payloads, form data, or AI output to an external backend

scenarios.label: Update or Modify
scenarios.description: Partially update an existing record in an external system

scenarios.label: Replace Record
scenarios.description: Fully replace an existing resource in an external system

scenarios.label: Delete Resource
scenarios.description: Remove a record or resource from an external service

scenarios.label: Trigger External System
scenarios.description: Fire a webhook or trigger an external automation pipeline

output_fields.ok: Boolean — true if response status is in the 2xx range
output_fields.response: String — full response body as a raw string
